messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0122",
  "title": "理想主义底色下的“不着急”与长线定力",
  "page_index": 35,
  "page_range": "35"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0123",
    "title": "数据趋势分析：",
    "page_range": "35",
    "summary": "This section provides a monthly revenue trend analysis for six video game titles. It answers retrieval questions regarding: (1) **Topics & Metrics**: Approximate monthly financial performance (in 万元) and patterns of revenue stability versus volatility; (2) **Entities**: 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, and 仙境传说M; (3) **Dates**: Monthly breakdowns from January through December; (4) **Evidence Type**: Structured numerical data lists. The section does not contain definitions, procedures, explicit claims, tables, figures, or external citations. It enables precise retrieval of specific monthly revenue amounts, identification of peak and trough months per title, month-over-month changes, and comparative financial performance across the six games. All figures are explicitly marked as estimates (\"约\")."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0124",
    "title": "主要信息：",
    "page_range": "35-1",
    "summary": "This section summarizes monthly revenue/performance trends for six mobile games, derived from a line chart independently produced by Diandian Data. It supports retrieval for the following categories and questions:\n\n- **Topics & Claims:** Comparative market performance trajectories, seasonal revenue fluctuations, and year-over-year stability/decline patterns across mobile gaming titles.\n- **Entities & Metrics:** Specific revenue figures (in 万元) for 心动小镇 (~2900万 peak), 伊瑟 (1700万 in Sep, 3000万 in Oct), 火炬之光：无限 (1700万 in Apr, 2800万 in Oct), and 仙境传说M (~100万 stable). 出发吧麦芬 and 香肠派对 are noted for early-year strength followed by post-October decline.\n- **Dates & Temporal Trends:** Key performance months including July (心动小镇 peak), April & October (火炬之光：无限 spikes), September & October (伊瑟 growth), and the post-October drop-off for two titles.\n- **Figures & Evidence Types:** A line chart (折线图) visualizing monthly sales/performance, with data sourced from 点点数据自主研究及绘制 (Diandian Data independent research).\n- **Answerable Queries:** “What was the peak monthly revenue for [Game]?” “Which games showed significant growth in September or October?” “How did [Game]’s performance trend from early year through October?” “What visualization and data source are used for this market analysis?” “Which title maintained stable ~100万 monthly performance throughout the year?”"
  }
]

message.content: This section provides a retrieval-oriented analysis of monthly revenue trends for six mobile game titles, focusing on comparative market performance, seasonal fluctuations, and long-term stability patterns. **Topics & Metrics**: Monthly financial performance and revenue stability/volatility, measured in estimated figures (万元) explicitly marked as approximations (“约”). **Entities**: 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, and 仙境传说M. **Dates**: Full-year monthly breakdowns (January–December), with specific temporal focus on April, July, September, October, and post-October performance shifts. **Figures & Evidence Types**: Features a line chart (折线图) visualizing monthly sales trajectories, supported by structured numerical data lists sourced from independent research by Diandian Data (点点数据自主研究及绘制). No tables, definitions, or procedures are present. **Claims & Patterns**: Documents distinct revenue trajectories, including 心动小镇’s July peak (~2900万), 伊瑟 and 火炬之光：无限’s September/October growth spikes, 仙境传说M’s consistent ~100万 monthly baseline, and the early-year strength followed by post-October decline for 出发吧麦芬 and 香肠派对. The section enables precise retrieval of specific monthly revenue estimates, identification of peak/trough months, month-over-month changes, cross-title financial comparisons, and verification of the underlying data visualization and source.

     - Dates & Temporal Trends: Key months (Jul, Apr, Oct, Sep, post-Oct).
     - Figures & Evidence Types: Line chart (折线图) visualizing monthly sales/performance. Source: 点点数据自主研究及绘制 (Diandian Data independent research).
     - Answerable Queries: Peak revenue, growth months, trend trajectories, visualization/source, stable performers.

3.  **Synthesize & Structure Parent Summary:**
   - *Goal:* Combine the child summaries into a cohesive, retrieval-oriented summary for the parent section "理想主义底色下的“不着急”与长线定力" (Page 35).

     - **Topics:** Monthly revenue trend analysis, comparative market performance, seasonal fluctuations, and long-term stability/decline patterns for mobile games.
     - **Entities:** Six video game titles: 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, 仙境传说M.
     - **Metrics:** Monthly revenue/performance figures in 万元 (all explicitly noted as estimates "约").
     - **Dates:** Monthly breakdowns from January through December, with specific focus on key performance months (April, July, September, October) and post-October trends.
     - **Figures/Tables & Evidence:** Features a line chart (折线图) visualizing monthly sales trends. Data is sourced from independent research by Diandian Data (点点数据自主研究及绘制). Evidence types include structured numerical data lists and the line chart visualization.
     - **Claims/Patterns:** Highlights distinct performance trajectories: 心动小镇 peaks in July (~2900万); 伊瑟 and 火炬之光：无限 show significant growth/spikes in September/October; 仙境传说M maintains stable ~100万 monthly revenue; 出发吧麦芬 and 香肠派对 demonstrate early-year strength followed by a post-October decline.
     - **Retrieval Utility:** Enables precise lookup of monthly revenue estimates, identification of peak/trough months, month-over-month changes, comparative performance across titles, and verification of data sources/visualizations.

The section contains no definitions, procedures, or external citations. It is optimized for retrieving specific monthly revenue estimates, identifying peak/trough periods, tracking month-over-month changes, comparing cross-title financial performance, and verifying the underlying data visualization and source.

response_text: This section provides a retrieval-oriented analysis of monthly revenue trends for six mobile game titles, focusing on comparative market performance, seasonal fluctuations, and long-term stability patterns. **Topics & Metrics**: Monthly financial performance and revenue stability/volatility, measured in estimated figures (万元) explicitly marked as approximations (“约”). **Entities**: 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, and 仙境传说M. **Dates**: Full-year monthly breakdowns (January–December), with specific temporal focus on April, July, September, October, and post-October performance shifts. **Figures & Evidence Types**: Features a line chart (折线图) visualizing monthly sales trajectories, supported by structured numerical data lists sourced from independent research by Diandian Data (点点数据自主研究及绘制). No tables, definitions, or procedures are present. **Claims & Patterns**: Documents distinct revenue trajectories, including 心动小镇’s July peak (~2900万), 伊瑟 and 火炬之光：无限’s September/October growth spikes, 仙境传说M’s consistent ~100万 monthly baseline, and the early-year strength followed by post-October decline for 出发吧麦芬 and 香肠派对. The section enables precise retrieval of specific monthly revenue estimates, identification of peak/trough months, month-over-month changes, cross-title financial comparisons, and verification of the underlying data visualization and source.
